title: cyathea whitmeei
intro: Cyathea whitmeei, also known as the Whitmee's tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the island of Lord Howe in the Pacific Ocean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyathea whitmeei include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Cyathea whitmeei can be made into teas, infusions, and poultices to utilize its medicinal properties.
